---
title: "Iran War Visualization: Energy Infrastructure Analysis"
subtitle: "Infrastructure Mapping, Anomaly Detection, and Incident Validation"
author: 
  - name: "[Author Name]"
    affiliation: "[Institution]"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: 
      - paper=a1paper
      - orientation=landscape  
      - margin=0.5in
      - left=0.7in
      - right=2.5in
    fontsize: 14pt
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{multicol}
        \usepackage{graphicx}
        \usepackage{tikz}
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{geometry}
        \usepackage[font=small,labelfont=bf]{caption}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        
        % Custom colors
        \definecolor{headerblue}{RGB}{41,128,185}
        \definecolor{lightgray}{RGB}{245,245,245}
        \definecolor{darkgray}{RGB}{64,64,64}
        \definecolor{babyblue}{RGB}{235,245,255}
        
        % Custom spacing
        \setlength{\columnsep}{0.8cm}
        \setlength{\parskip}{0.3em}
        
        % Header setup
        \pagestyle{fancy}
        \fancyhf{}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        
        % Title formatting
        \titleformat{\section}{\large\bfseries\color{headerblue}}{\thesection}{1em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsection}{\normalsize\bfseries\color{darkgray}}{\thesubsection}{1em}{}
        
        % Custom commands for poster layout
        \newcommand{\postergrid}[1]{%
          \begin{minipage}[t]{\textwidth}
            #1
          \end{minipage}
        }
        
        \newcommand{\postercolumn}[2]{%
          \begin{minipage}[t]{#1\textwidth}
            #2
          \end{minipage}
        }
        
        \newcommand{\placeholderbox}[3]{%
          \begin{center}
            \tikz \draw[lightgray, thick] (0,0) rectangle (#1,#2) node[pos=.5, color=darkgray] {\textbf{#3}};
          \end{center}
        }
        
pdf-engine: pdflatex
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=latex}
% Set background color
\pagecolor{babyblue}

% Title Section
\begin{center}
{\Huge\bfseries\color{headerblue} Iran War Visualization: Energy Infrastructure Analysis}\\[0.3cm]
{\Large Infrastructure Mapping, Anomaly Detection, and Incident Validation}\\[0.5cm]
{\large [Author Name] -- [Institution]}\\[0.2cm]
{\normalsize \today}
\end{center}

\vspace{0.3cm}

% Main Content Area (left side, leaving right margin for sources)
\begin{minipage}[c]{0.75\textwidth}
\vfill

% Upper Row - Maps (3 columns)
\section*{Energy Infrastructure Analysis}

\begin{minipage}[t]{0.32\textwidth}
\centering
\placeholderbox{6cm}{6cm}{Map 1\\Placeholder}
\vspace{0.3cm}
\subsection*{Description 1}
[Placeholder text for map 1 description. This will contain details about what the visualization shows and key findings.]

\subsection*{Methodology 1}
[Placeholder text for map 1 methodology. This will explain the data sources and analysis approach used.]
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.32\textwidth}
\centering
\placeholderbox{6cm}{6cm}{Map 2\\Placeholder}
\vspace{0.3cm}
\subsection*{Description 2}
[Placeholder text for map 2 description. This will contain details about what the visualization shows and key findings.]

\subsection*{Methodology 2}
[Placeholder text for map 2 methodology. This will explain the data sources and analysis approach used.]
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.32\textwidth}
\centering
\placeholderbox{6cm}{6cm}{Map 3\\Placeholder}
\vspace{0.3cm}
\subsection*{Description 3}
[Placeholder text for map 3 description. This will contain details about what the visualization shows and key findings.]

\subsection*{Methodology 3}
[Placeholder text for map 3 methodology. This will explain the data sources and analysis approach used.]
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.8cm}

% Lower Row - Graphs/Plots (3 columns)
\section*{Analysis Results}

\begin{minipage}[t]{0.32\textwidth}
\centering
\placeholderbox{6cm}{4cm}{Graph 1\\Placeholder}
\vspace{0.3cm}
\subsection*{Description 4}
[Placeholder text for graph 1 description. This will contain details about what the visualization shows and key findings.]

\subsection*{Methodology 4}
[Placeholder text for graph 1 methodology. This will explain the data sources and analysis approach used.]
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.32\textwidth}
\centering
\placeholderbox{6cm}{4cm}{Graph 2\\Placeholder}
\vspace{0.3cm}
\subsection*{Description 5}
[Placeholder text for graph 2 description. This will contain details about what the visualization shows and key findings.]

\subsection*{Methodology 5}
[Placeholder text for graph 2 methodology. This will explain the data sources and analysis approach used.]
\end{minipage}
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.32\textwidth}
\centering
\placeholderbox{6cm}{4cm}{Graph 3\\Placeholder}
\vspace{0.3cm}
\subsection*{Description 6}
[Placeholder text for graph 3 description. This will contain details about what the visualization shows and key findings.]

\subsection*{Methodology 6}
[Placeholder text for graph 3 methodology. This will explain the data sources and analysis approach used.]
\vfill
\end{minipage}
\hfill
% Right margin for sources
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.22\textwidth}
\section{Sources \& References}
\small

\subsection{Tools \& Software}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=0.5em, itemsep=0.1em]
\item R Statistical Software
\item GDAL/OGR Geospatial Libraries
\item Earth Engine API
\item Quarto Publishing System
\end{itemize}

\subsection{Contact}
\textbf{[Author Name]}\\
[Institution]\\
[Email]\\
[Website/GitHub]

\vspace{0.5cm}

\subsection{Data Sources}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=0.5em, itemsep=0.1em]
\item OGIM v1.1 Infrastructure Database
\item GEM Energy Trackers (GOIT, GGIT, GOGET, GChI)
\item KAPSARC GCC Oil Fields
\item GDELT Global Events Database
\item FIRMS Fire/Hotspot Data
\item OpenStreetMap (Gap-fill only)
\end{itemize}

\end{minipage}

```
